title: Lacustrine retirement handoff
body: Team member closeout: Boundary owned: Seaworthy-routed Route C practice.md cleanup and follow-on practice-bootstrap.md cleanup. Outcome: practice.md landed at 60ae4040; practice-bootstrap.md landed at ab438d1f via Stratospheric marshal after focused handoff. Evidence: Seaworthy handoff event 1b17a464, rejoin status event d6a2ca3d, bootstrap landed HEAD ab438d1f. Claims / queue / git state: Lacustrine source claim 288139da-6d0a-48ff-af54-9df0423fcbdc closed explicitly at 2026-05-23T10:54:10Z; Lacustrine queue intent 48138a96 remains abandoned; current active queue is Gilded PDR-072 intent b3a8a5c4-cd66-4c7c-a785-03668859189c. Surprise or changed understanding: source-agent queue items can block marshal FIFO, so this session used comms handoff plus marshal-owned intent. Blockers or risks: none retained by Lacustrine. Handoff needed: no Lacustrine source ownership remains; session is retiring and will not take further messages or implementation work.
